hello.text: The training ring north of town is open. Bring me thunder stories when you return.

forge.text: I can shape a blade, but Aetherwake chooses the hand that carries it.

hello.text: Cure is magic, not chi. Mira should call on the quiet light and let it answer.
Aetherwake began as a town that remembered tomorrow before yesterday could end.

warning.text: When the sky splits blue, listen for what the thunder is trying to name.

hello.text: I saw a red core at the training field. It just floats there like it owns the place.
